---
title: "trucktrack"
subtitle: "Slide decks"
author: "Jesse Tweedle"
date: today
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
---

## Decks

- [How](how/) — diagram gallery.
- [Filter pipeline](filters/) — speed, observation gap, stop, traffic-jam, stale-ping filters with before/after maps.
- [Valhalla & partitioning](valhalla/) — tile hierarchy, tier classification, map-matching, gap bridging.

## Source

[github.com/twedl/trucktrack](https://github.com/twedl/trucktrack)
